caption: 今天又中招了。
scene: Sage and Andy standing beside two shared bikes on the street, Andy looking down with a flat dismayed face at a saddle with two tiny water-drop shapes on it, one paw hovering above it, while Sage beside him flips his own saddle dry with one hand, a small puddle line under the wheels.
bible_hook: §3 shared bikes — often the seat is wet
rationale: Pulls a fresh city-friction motif (wet bike saddle) from bucket D that hasn't appeared in 30 days, and holds the small daily annoyance against Sage's tiny fix in the same frame; recent posts were mostly home/sofa, so this moves us to a commute moment.
